metadata.description: Project name used in resource naming
Hub agent subnet ID (from networking phase)
Hub APIM subnet ID (from networking phase)
Model deployments for the hub Foundry
Instance suffix to differentiate hub/spoke deployments
Model deployments to create on this Foundry instance
APIM gateway URL for agent gateway connection (leave empty for hub)
APIM subscription key for agent gateway connection
Application Insights connection string for tracing
ACR login server for hosted agent image pull (leave empty to skip)
ACR resource ID for the connection credential (required when acrLoginServer is set)
APIM SKU (StandardV2 required for Agent Service gateway, Premium for full VNet isolation)
Foundry endpoint URL (used as backend service URL)
Subnet ID for APIM outbound VNet integration (delegated to Microsoft.Web/serverFarms)

variables.$fxv#0:
<policies>
  <inbound>
    <base />
    <!-- Rate limiting: 100 calls per minute per subscription -->
    <rate-limit calls="100" renewal-period="60" />
    <!--
      Multi-backend routing:
      - Default: Azure AI Foundry (managed identity auth)
      - Custom:  Set header "x-backend-id" to the APIM backend name
                 and pass the backend's API key in the "api-key" header.
                 The key is forwarded as a Bearer token to the external backend.
    -->
    <choose>
      <when condition="@(context.Request.Headers.ContainsKey("x-backend-id"))">
        <!-- External backend: use client-provided api-key as Bearer token -->
        <set-variable name="external-backend" value="@(context.Request.Headers.GetValueOrDefault("x-backend-id", ""))" />
        <set-backend-service backend-id="@((string)context.Variables["external-backend"])" />
        <set-header name="Authorization" exists-action="override">
          <value>@("Bearer " + context.Request.Headers.GetValueOrDefault("api-key", ""))</value>
        </set-header>
        <set-header name="api-key" exists-action="delete" />
        <set-header name="x-backend-id" exists-action="delete" />
      </when>
      <otherwise>
        <!-- Azure AI Foundry: managed identity auth -->
        <authentication-managed-identity resource="https://cognitiveservices.azure.com"
                                         output-token-variable-name="managed-id-access-token"
                                         ignore-error="false" />
        <set-header name="Authorization" exists-action="override">
          <value>@("Bearer " + (string)context.Variables["managed-id-access-token"])</value>
        </set-header>
        <set-header name="api-key" exists-action="delete" />
        <set-query-parameter name="api-version" exists-action="skip">
          <value>2025-03-01-preview</value>
        </set-query-parameter>
        <set-backend-service backend-id="foundry-backend" />
      </otherwise>
    </choose>
  </inbound>
  <backend>
    <base />
  </backend>
  <outbound>
    <base />
  </outbound>
  <on-error>
    <base />
  </on-error>
</policies>
